title: Publish v0.5 catalog release
context: The v0.5 release consolidates the M2 enrichment (fusion detail, molecular availability, literature extraction, drug-response flags) into a published catalog meeting the M2 Definition of Done (PLAN M2: >=60 models, >=70% cross-ref). Depends on 012-015. Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Publish the v0.5 catalog incorporating M2 enrichment with full provenance, signed re-id review, and CI green.
acceptanceCriteria: >=60 models published (O1) with >=70% cross-ref coverage (O3); 100% provenance + license-cleared.
Molecular-availability index with access-tier labels and reviewed PMC-OA extraction included.
Domain spot-check passed; re-id review signed; CHANGELOG + versioned release tagged under CC BY 4.0.
output: output/ v0.5 catalog release (catalog.json + catalog.csv + provenance.json + CHANGELOG) under CC BY 4.0 with signed reid-review.
